raw_consumer_statement: The 1st charge US {$960.00}, was done when I reserved for a room from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX mistakenly denied on the charge to Citibank. I admitted my mistake calling back the next day. A new card was in the process to be sent to me. I kept my hotel reservation and allowed the hotel charge US {$960.00} again my new card on XX/XX/XXXX, when it arrived. Later I learned from the hotel manager Citicard disputed on both charges. Late in XX/XX/XXXX I got the XXXXXXXX XXXX permission to grant my cancelation. My Citi statements of XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX show these two charges. I obtained email proofs with VISA XXXX numbers confirming refunds of both chagres from the XXXX and their bank. I wrote to Citibank XX/XX/XXXX and on XX/XX/XXXX Dispute Center still denied receiving the first refund of US {$900.00} the amount I requested for credit. And advised me to sue Citibank in small claims court of the 1st charge that they still owe me.
